SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Accumulator
Tracks aggregation state for a single group during aggregate computation.
AggregateFunctionHandle
Placeholder handle for a registered aggregate UDF entry returned by TaskContext.aggregateFunctions().
AggregateUDF
A user-defined aggregate function that can be registered with a SessionContext.
ArrowReadOptions
Options for reading Arrow IPC files.
ArrowReadOptions.Builder
Builder for ArrowReadOptions.
ArrowTypeProtoConverter
Converts between proto ArrowType messages and Arrow Java types.
Boundedness
The boundedness of an execution plan's input data.
BridgeUtil
Helpers used by *Bridge classes.
CaseBuilder
Builder for CASE/WHEN/THEN/ELSE expressions.
CatalogOptions
Catalog configuration options.
CatalogOptions.Builder
Builder for CatalogOptions.
CatalogProvider
A provider of schemas within a catalog.
Column
A logical column reference, corresponding to DataFusion's datafusion_common::Column.
ColumnAssignment
A column assignment for an UPDATE statement, pairing a column name with a new value expression.
ConfigOptions
Configuration options for a SessionContext.
ConfigOptions.Builder
Builder for ConfigOptions.
CsvOptions
Options for writing CSV files.
CsvOptions.Builder
Builder for CsvOptions.
CsvReadOptions
Options for reading CSV files.
CsvReadOptions.Builder
Builder for CsvReadOptions.
DataFrame
A DataFrame representing the result of a DataFusion query.
DataFrameBridge
Bridge between public DataFrame API and Diplomat-generated DfDataFrame.
DataFrameWriteOptions
Options controlling how data is written from a DataFrame.
DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder
Builder for DataFrameWriteOptions.
DataFusionError
Base exception class for DataFusion errors.
DfAggregateUDFAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented AggregateUDF to the Diplomat-generated DfAggregateUdfTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
DfCatalogAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented CatalogProvider to the Diplomat-generated DfCatalogTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
DfFileFormatAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented FileFormat to the Diplomat-generated DfFileFormatTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
DfScalarUDFAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented ScalarUDF to the Diplomat-generated DfScalarUdfTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
DfTableAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented TableProvider to the Diplomat-generated DfTableTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
DfVarProviderAdapter
Adapts a user-implemented VarProvider to the Diplomat-generated DfVarProviderTrait interface for FFI callbacks.
Dialect
SQL dialect for the parser.
EmissionType
The emission type of an execution plan, describing how it produces output.
ExecutionOptions
Execution configuration options.
ExecutionOptions.Builder
Builder for ExecutionOptions.
ExecutionPlan
An execution plan that produces record batches.
ExplainAnalyzeLevel
Detail level for EXPLAIN ANALYZE output.
ExplainFormat
Output format for EXPLAIN statements.
ExplainOptions
EXPLAIN statement configuration options.
ExplainOptions.Builder
Builder for ExplainOptions.
Expr
A DataFusion logical expression, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::Expr.
Expr.AggregateFunctionExpr
An aggregate function call (Expr::AggregateFunction).
Expr.AliasExpr
An alias expression (Expr::Alias).
Expr.BetweenExpr
A BETWEEN expression (Expr::Between).
Expr.BinaryExpr
A binary expression (Expr::BinaryExpr).
Expr.CaseExpr
A CASE expression (Expr::Case).
Expr.CastExpr
A CAST expression (Expr::Cast).
Expr.ColumnExpr
A column reference (Expr::Column).
Expr.GroupingSetExpr
A grouping set expression (Expr::GroupingSet).
Expr.InListExpr
An IN list expression (Expr::InList).
Expr.IsFalseExpr
An IS FALSE expression (Expr::IsFalse).
Expr.IsNotFalseExpr
An IS NOT FALSE expression (Expr::IsNotFalse).
Expr.IsNotNullExpr
An IS NOT NULL expression (Expr::IsNotNull).
Expr.IsNotTrueExpr
An IS NOT TRUE expression (Expr::IsNotTrue).
Expr.IsNotUnknownExpr
An IS NOT UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsNotUnknown).
Expr.IsNullExpr
An IS NULL expression (Expr::IsNull).
Expr.IsTrueExpr
An IS TRUE expression (Expr::IsTrue).
Expr.IsUnknownExpr
An IS UNKNOWN expression (Expr::IsUnknown).
Expr.LikeExpr
A LIKE expression (Expr::Like).
Expr.LiteralExpr
A literal value (Expr::Literal).
Expr.NegativeExpr
A negation expression (Expr::Negative).
Expr.NotExpr
A NOT expression (Expr::Not).
Expr.PlaceholderExpr
A placeholder expression (Expr::Placeholder).
Expr.ScalarFunctionExpr
A scalar function call (Expr::ScalarFunction).
Expr.SimilarToExpr
A SIMILAR TO expression (Expr::SimilarTo).
Expr.TryCastExpr
A TRY_CAST expression (Expr::TryCast).
Expr.UnnestExpr
An UNNEST expression (Expr::Unnest).
Expr.UnresolvedExpr
A catch-all for expression variants that cannot be fully decoded in Java.
Expr.WildcardExpr
A wildcard expression (Expr::Wildcard).
Expr.WindowFunctionExpr
A window function call (Expr::WindowFunction).
ExprProtoConverter
Converts between proto LogicalExprNode/LogicalExprList messages and rich Java Expr records.
FileFormat
Interface for file format implementations that can parse file content into Arrow record batches.
FileOpener
Interface for opening files and producing record batches.
FileRange
A byte range within a file, specifying a contiguous segment to read.
FileScanConfig
Scan configuration passed from DataFusion to FileSource.createFileOpener(org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema, org.apache.arrow.memory.BufferAllocator, org.apache.arrow.datafusion.datasource.FileScanConfig) containing query-specific parameters extracted from the upstream FileScanConfig Rust struct.
FileSource
Interface for creating file openers that can parse files of a specific format.
FlightSqlFederatedCatalog
A federation-aware CatalogProvider backed by a remote Flight SQL service.
FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.Builder
Builder for FlightSqlFederatedCatalog.
FlightSqlTableProvider
A TableProvider backed by a remote Flight SQL service.
FlightSqlTableProvider.Builder
Builder for FlightSqlTableProvider.
FormatOptions
Display format configuration options.
FormatOptions.Builder
Builder for FormatOptions.
Functions
Static factory methods for building DataFusion expressions.
GroupingSet
The kind of grouping set, corresponding to DataFusion's GroupingSet variants.
Guarantee
The type of guarantee from a literal guarantee analysis.
InsertOp
Insert operation mode for DataFrame write operations.
JoinConstraint
The constraint type for join operations (ON vs USING).
JoinType
The type of join operation.
JsonOptions
Options for writing JSON files.
JsonOptions.Builder
Builder for JsonOptions.
ListingOptions
Configuration options for a listing table.
ListingOptions.Builder
Builder for ListingOptions.
ListingTable
A file-backed listing table.
ListingTableConfig
Configuration for creating a ListingTable.
ListingTableUrl
A URL pointing to a directory of files for a listing table.
LiteralGuarantee
A guarantee about the values of a column derived from analyzing filter expressions.
LiteralGuaranteeBridge
Bridge between the public LiteralGuarantee API and Diplomat-generated DfLiteralGuarantees.
Location
A source code location within an expression, consisting of a line and column.
LogicalPlan
A DataFusion logical plan node, corresponding to datafusion::logical_expr::LogicalPlan.
LogicalPlan.Aggregate
Groups and aggregates data (GROUP BY).
LogicalPlan.Analyze
Executes plan and prints physical plan with metrics (EXPLAIN ANALYZE).
LogicalPlan.Copy
COPY TO for writing plan results to files.
LogicalPlan.Ddl
Data Definition Language operations (CREATE, DROP).
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalog
CREATE DATABASE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateCatalogSchema
CREATE SCHEMA statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateExternalTable
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateFunction
CREATE FUNCTION statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateIndex
CREATE INDEX statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateMemoryTable
CREATE TABLE AS SELECT statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.CreateView
CREATE VIEW statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropCatalogSchema
DROP SCHEMA statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropFunction
DROP FUNCTION statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropTable
DROP TABLE statement.
LogicalPlan.Ddl.DropView
DROP VIEW statement.
LogicalPlan.DescribeTable
Describes table schema (DESCRIBE command).
LogicalPlan.Distinct
Removes duplicate rows (SELECT DISTINCT).
LogicalPlan.Distinct.All
Plain DISTINCT referencing all selection expressions.
LogicalPlan.Distinct.On
PostgreSQL-style DISTINCT ON with separate control over DISTINCT'd and selected columns.
LogicalPlan.Dml
Data Manipulation Language operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE).
LogicalPlan.EmptyRelation
Produces 0 or 1 placeholder rows (empty FROM clause).
LogicalPlan.Explain
Shows plan structure (EXPLAIN).
LogicalPlan.Extension
Custom relational operation defined outside DataFusion.
LogicalPlan.Filter
Filters rows that do not match a predicate (WHERE clause).
LogicalPlan.Join
Joins two relations on join conditions.
LogicalPlan.Limit
Skips rows then fetches a limited count (LIMIT/OFFSET).
LogicalPlan.Projection
Evaluates an arbitrary list of expressions (SELECT with expression list).
LogicalPlan.RecursiveQuery
Recursive CTEs (Common Table Expressions).
LogicalPlan.Repartition
Repartitions input for parallelism.
LogicalPlan.Sort
Sorts input per sort expressions (ORDER BY).
LogicalPlan.Statement
A non-relational SQL statement (SET, TRANSACTION, PREPARE, EXECUTE).
LogicalPlan.Statement.Deallocate
DEALLOCATE prepared statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.Execute
EXECUTE prepared statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.Prepare
PREPARE statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.ResetVariable
RESET variable statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.SetVariable
SET variable = value statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.TransactionEnd
COMMIT or ROLLBACK statement.
LogicalPlan.Statement.TransactionStart
BEGIN TRANSACTION statement.
LogicalPlan.Subquery
Executes a nested query (subquery).
LogicalPlan.SubqueryAlias
Provides or changes the name of a relation (AS alias).
LogicalPlan.TableScan
Reads rows from a table (FROM clause).
LogicalPlan.Union
Unions multiple inputs with the same schema (UNION ALL).
LogicalPlan.Unnest
Unnests nested list/struct type columns (UNNEST).
LogicalPlan.Values
Literal row values (VALUES clause).
LogicalPlan.Window
Window function computation (OVER clause).
LogicalPlanBridge
Bridge between public LogicalPlan API and Diplomat-generated DfLogicalPlan.
LogicalPlanBuilder
A builder for constructing LogicalPlans programmatically.
LogicalPlanBuilderBridge
Bridge between public LogicalPlanBuilder API and Diplomat-generated DfLogicalPlanBuilder.
LogicalPlanProtoConverter
Converts proto-encoded LogicalPlanNode messages into the Java LogicalPlan sealed interface.
MemoryPool
An opaque handle to a DataFusion memory pool.
MysqlConnectionPool
Handle to a MySQL connection pool, from which RustTableProvider and RustCatalogProvider instances can be opened.
MysqlConnectionPool.Builder
Builder for MysqlConnectionPool.
NativeCatalogProvider
A catalog provider backed by a native DataFusion catalog.
NativeDataFusionError
Exception indicating an error originating from the native DataFusion library.
NativeLoader
Handles loading the native DataFusion FFI library using Java's Foreign Function and Memory API.
NativeSchemaProvider
A schema provider backed by a native DataFusion schema.
NativeSendableRecordBatchStream
Common interface over Diplomat-generated stream types.
NdJsonReadOptions
Options for reading newline-delimited JSON files.
NdJsonReadOptions.Builder
Builder for NdJsonReadOptions.
NullEquality
Null equality semantics for join operations.
NullTreatment
How nulls are treated in aggregate and window functions, corresponding to DataFusion's NullTreatment.
ObjectMeta
Metadata for an object in an object store, containing its location and size.
Operator
Operators for binary expressions, corresponding to DataFusion's Operator enum.
OptimizerOptions
Optimizer configuration options.
OptimizerOptions.Builder
Builder for OptimizerOptions.
ParquetOptions
Parquet-specific configuration options.
ParquetOptions
Options for writing Parquet files.
ParquetOptions.Builder
Builder for ParquetOptions.
ParquetOptions.Builder
Builder for ParquetOptions.
ParquetOptions.ParquetColumnOptions
Per-column Parquet options.
ParquetReadOptions
Options for reading Parquet files.
ParquetReadOptions.Builder
Builder for ParquetReadOptions.
PartitionedFile
Represents a partitioned file from DataFusion's listing table scan.
PhysicalExpr
An opaque handle to a DataFusion physical expression.
PhysicalExprBridge
Bridge between the public PhysicalExpr API and Diplomat-generated DfPhysicalExpr.
PlanProperties
Properties of an execution plan that describe its output characteristics.
PostgresConnectionPool
Handle to a PostgreSQL connection pool, from which RustTableProvider and RustCatalogProvider instances can be opened.
PostgresConnectionPool.Builder
Builder for PostgresConnectionPool.
RecordBatchReader
Common interface for reading record batches.
RuntimeEnv
An opaque handle to a DataFusion RuntimeEnv.
RuntimeEnvBridge
Bridge between public RuntimeEnv API and Diplomat-generated DfRuntimeEnv.
RuntimeEnvBuilder
Builder for creating a RuntimeEnv with custom configuration.
RustCatalogProvider
Handle for a CatalogProvider constructed on the Rust side.
RustTableProvider
Handle for a TableProvider constructed on the Rust side.
ScalarFunctionHandle
Placeholder handle for a registered scalar UDF entry returned by TaskContext.scalarFunctions().
ScalarUDF
A user-defined scalar function that can be registered with a SessionContext.
ScalarUDFImpl
A simplified function interface for scalar UDFs with fixed input/output types.
ScalarValue
A scalar value from DataFusion, representing a single typed value.
ScalarValue.Binary
 
ScalarValue.BinaryValue
Sealed subinterface for binary variants, providing typed byte[] access.
ScalarValue.BinaryView
 
ScalarValue.BooleanValue
 
ScalarValue.Date32
 
ScalarValue.Date64
 
ScalarValue.DateValue
Sealed subinterface for date variants, providing typed LocalDate conversion.
ScalarValue.Decimal128
 
ScalarValue.Decimal256
 
ScalarValue.Decimal32
 
ScalarValue.Decimal64
 
ScalarValue.DecimalValue
Sealed subinterface for decimal variants, providing typed BigDecimal conversion.
ScalarValue.DictionaryValue
A dictionary-encoded scalar value.
ScalarValue.DurationMicrosecond
 
ScalarValue.DurationMillisecond
 
ScalarValue.DurationNanosecond
 
ScalarValue.DurationSecond
 
ScalarValue.DurationValue
Sealed subinterface for duration variants, providing typed Duration conversion.
ScalarValue.FixedSizeBinary
 
ScalarValue.FixedSizeListValue
A fixed-size list scalar value where every list has the same number of elements.
ScalarValue.Float16
 
ScalarValue.Float32
 
ScalarValue.Float64
 
ScalarValue.FloatValue
Sealed subinterface for floating-point variants, providing widening double conversion.
ScalarValue.Int16
 
ScalarValue.Int32
 
ScalarValue.Int64
 
ScalarValue.Int8
 
ScalarValue.IntegerValue
Sealed subinterface for integer variants, providing widening numeric conversions.
ScalarValue.IntervalDayTime
 
ScalarValue.IntervalMonthDayNano
 
ScalarValue.IntervalYearMonth
 
ScalarValue.LargeBinary
 
ScalarValue.LargeListValue
A large list scalar value (64-bit offsets) containing ordered elements.
ScalarValue.LargeUtf8
 
ScalarValue.ListScalarValue
Sealed subinterface for list-like variants (List, LargeList, FixedSizeList), providing typed List access to the contained ScalarValue elements.
ScalarValue.ListValue
A list scalar value containing ordered elements.
ScalarValue.MapScalarValue
Sealed subinterface for map-like variants (Struct, Map), providing typed Map access to key-value data.
ScalarValue.MapValue
A map scalar value containing key-value entries.
ScalarValue.Null
 
ScalarValue.RunEndEncodedValue
A run-end encoded scalar value.
ScalarValue.StringValue
Sealed subinterface for string variants, providing typed String access.
ScalarValue.StructValue
A struct scalar value with named fields.
ScalarValue.Time32Millisecond
 
ScalarValue.Time32Second
 
ScalarValue.Time64Microsecond
 
ScalarValue.Time64Nanosecond
 
ScalarValue.TimestampMicrosecond
 
ScalarValue.TimestampMillisecond
 
ScalarValue.TimestampNanosecond
 
ScalarValue.TimestampSecond
 
ScalarValue.TimestampValue
Sealed subinterface for timestamp variants, providing typed Instant conversion.
ScalarValue.TimeValue
Sealed subinterface for time-of-day variants, providing typed LocalTime conversion.
ScalarValue.UInt16
 
ScalarValue.UInt32
 
ScalarValue.UInt64
 
ScalarValue.UInt8
 
ScalarValue.UnionValue
A union scalar value representing one variant of a union type.
ScalarValue.Utf8
 
ScalarValue.Utf8View
 
ScalarValueProtoConverter
Converts between proto ScalarValue messages and Java ScalarValue records.
ScanArgs
Arguments for a table scan operation.
SchemaProvider
A provider of tables within a catalog schema.
SendableRecordBatchStream
A stream of record batches from a DataFusion query execution.
SendableRecordBatchStreamBridge
Bridge between public SendableRecordBatchStream API and Diplomat-generated DfRecordBatchStream.
Session
A borrowed handle to the DataFusion session available during a TableProvider.scanWithArgs(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.Session, org.apache.arrow.datafusion.catalog.ScanArgs) callback.
SessionConfig
Snapshot of a DataFusion session's configuration.
SessionContext
A session context for executing DataFusion queries using the FFM API.
SessionContextBridge
Bridge between public SessionContext API and Diplomat-generated DfSessionContext.
SessionState
A snapshot of a DataFusion session's state, capable of creating logical plans.
SessionStateBridge
Bridge between public SessionState API and Diplomat-generated DfSessionState.
Signature
Defines the type signature and volatility for a function.
SimpleScalarUDF
A scalar UDF with a single fixed signature and return type.
SortExpr
A sort expression, corresponding to DataFusion's SortExpr.
Span
A span in source code, defined by a start and end location.
Spans
A collection of source code spans associated with an expression.
SpillCompression
Compression codec used for spilling intermediate results to disk.
SqliteConnectionPool
Handle to a SQLite connection pool, from which RustTableProvider and RustCatalogProvider instances can be opened.
SqliteConnectionPool.Mode
SQLite open mode.
SqlParserOptions
SQL parser configuration options.
SqlParserOptions.Builder
Builder for SqlParserOptions.
TableProvider
A table provider that can be registered with a DataFusion session.
TableProviderFilterPushDown
Indicates whether a filter expression can be handled by a TableProvider.
TableReference
A reference to a table, which may be unqualified (bare), partially qualified (schema + table), or fully qualified (catalog + schema + table).
TableReference.Bare
An unqualified table reference consisting of only a table name.
TableReference.Full
A fully qualified table reference consisting of a catalog, schema, and table name.
TableReference.Partial
A partially qualified table reference consisting of a schema and table name.
TableReferenceConverter
Utilities for converting between Java TableReference and protobuf representations.
TableType
The type of a table in a DataFusion catalog.
TaskContext
Task-level execution context handed to a Java ExecutionPlan during execute.
TransactionAccessMode
Transaction access mode (READ ONLY or READ WRITE).
TransactionConclusion
Transaction conclusion type (COMMIT or ROLLBACK).
TransactionIsolationLevel
Transaction isolation level.
VarProvider
A provider of variable values for SQL queries.
VarType
The type of variable being registered with a VarProvider.
Volatility
The volatility of a scalar UDF, indicating how its result depends on its inputs.
WhenThen
A when-then pair in a CASE expression.
WildcardOptions
Options for a wildcard expression, corresponding to DataFusion's WildcardOptions.
WindowFrame
A window frame definition, corresponding to DataFusion's WindowFrame.
WindowFrameBound
A window frame boundary, corresponding to DataFusion's WindowFrameBound.
WindowFrameBound.CurrentRow
The current row boundary.
WindowFrameBound.Following
A following boundary.
WindowFrameBound.Preceding
A preceding boundary.
WindowFrameUnits
The type of a window frame, corresponding to DataFusion's WindowFrameUnits.
WriteOp
The type of DML write operation.
